title: Spot and fix LiveView with three handle_event bugs
prompt: `test_fixtures/liveview_missing_authz.ex` has three related authorization bugs: (1) `delete` handle_event — no ownership check, (2) `publish` handle_event — no ownership check, (3) `promote_to_admin` — uses variable-time `==` on `current_user.role`. Rewrite the LiveView so every `handle_event/3` clause: (a) loads the record via a user-scoped query (e.g., `Blog.get_user_post!(current_user, id)`), (b) uses a `Policy.can?/3` helper instead of string comparison, (c) returns a flash error on unauthorized attempts. Do NOT include the deprecated `current_user.role == "admin"` pattern. Write the fix to `lib/my_app_web/live/post_live/index.ex`.
tier_rationale: Hard — requires fixing three related authz bugs plus the timing-leak on role comparison, all in one LiveView.
